goal: Wire worktree primitives into team.md, implement.md, resume.md, and implementer.md — replacing shared-directory parallel execution.

tasks.name: Update team.md Implement Action
tasks.action: Rewrite the implement action to use worktree lifecycle: create_session → spawn agents with worktree paths → merge_session → resolver on conflict → cleanup_session. Replace Steps 4-11.

tasks.name: Update implement.md + bridge.py Advisory Mode
tasks.action: Update Step 1c detection logic to reflect worktrees-only mode. Update detect_file_conflicts() to return advisory severity instead of blocking.

tasks.name: Update resume.md + implementer.md for Worktrees
tasks.action: Add worktree session recovery to resume.md Step 3b. Add commit step to implementer.md and worktree awareness rules.

commitMessage:
feat(worktree-parallel-agents): wire worktrees into team, implement, resume commands

- Replace shared-dir parallel execution with worktree isolation in team.md
- Update implement.md — file conflicts are advisory, not blocking
- Add worktree session recovery to resume.md
- Add commit step to implementer.md for worktree branches
- Update bridge.py detect_file_conflicts() to return advisory severity
